name: redactor-mvp
description: Static browser-based redaction tool for safer LLM workflows.

scripts.vendor:browser-deps: node ./scripts/vendor-tesseract.mjs && node ./scripts/vendor-exceljs.mjs && node ./scripts/vendor-pdfjs.mjs && node ./scripts/vendor-pdflib.mjs && node ./scripts/vendor-mammoth.mjs && node ./scripts/vendor-markdown-parser.mjs
